goal: is_countable[Int](Set.universal_set[Int]) = (Set.universal_set[Int] = Set.empty_set[Int] or exists(k0: Nat -> Int) { forall(x0: Int) { Set.universal_set[Int].contains(x0) implies exists(k1: Nat) { k0(k1) = x0 } } })

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0]) { (Set.empty_set[T0] = x0 or exists(k0: Nat -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { not x1 ∈ x0 or exists(k1: Nat) { k0(k1) = x1 } } }) = is_countable[T0](x0) }[Int](Set.universal_set[Int])
